title: Switch to sysregistriesv2
body: Switch from using `github.com/containers/image/pkg/sysregistries` to using `github.com/containers/image/pkg/sysregistriesv2` to complete unqualified image names.  Keep v1 around because it'll tell us which configuration file to name in an error message if things don't work right.

comments.body: FYI @vrothberg (not sure if you watch Buildah).

:pushpin: Commit c02aeb0 has been approved by `rhatdan`
